mapper.select: SELECT id, name, model, manufacturer, serial_number, drone_type, flight_minutes, speed_kmh, payload_kg, status, description, created_at FROM drones WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE drones SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, drone_type = #{droneType}, flight_minutes = #{flightMinutes}, speed_kmh = #{speedKmh}, payload_kg = #{payloadKg}, status = #{status}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
